items.description: Vehicle fire on I-476 northbound between 1.2 miles north of Exit 9: PA 3 - BROOMALL/UPPER DARBY and 1.9 miles north of Exit 9: PA 3 - BROOMALL/UPPER DARBY. There is a lane restriction.
